meta.title: Privacy Policy | aws overseas
meta.description: Read the aws overseas Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how aws overseas collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect personal information such as your name, company name, email address, phone number, shipping details, billing information, and documents required to arrange your shipments.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: Your information is used to process shipments, generate quotations, communicate with you, improve our services, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: aws overseas uses appropriate security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
sections.content: We may use trusted third-party services including payment gateways, email providers, analytics, and shipping partners to deliver our services.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: Our website may use cookies to improve user experience, remember preferences, and analyze website traffic.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information by contacting our support team.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact aws overseas.
